title: lactuca repens
intro: Lactuca repens, also known as creeping lettuce, is a perennial plant in the dandelion family that grows low to the ground with long stems and leaves. The plant's medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Lactuca repens include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting liver function. Lactuca repens can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, with some herbalists recommending it as a treatment for liver and digestive disorders.
